ideal_must_detect.matched_text: The acquisition working group for a small domestic systems integrator met separately under established information-barrier controls; this report does not discuss targets, terms, or timetables.

must_detect.matched_text: The acquisition working group for a small domestic systems integrator met separately under established information-barrier controls; this report does not discuss targets, terms, or timetables.

During the drill, the ESG reporting module for Scope 2 electricity data briefly failed over; the team restored normal logging within 27 minutes.
No APPI personal data or My Number (kojin bangō) were processed in the drill, and no individual codes appear in the logs (example placeholders like 0000-XXXX do not correspond to actual IDs).
Publicly released materials on our environmental targets (TCFD-aligned) were referenced; this report does not update any KPIs and contains no undisclosed climate commitments.
Insider-list procedures and information-barrier checks were rehearsed using a tabletop scenario about a hypothetical green-bond issuance; this was an educational exercise with mock names only.
Commercial-term language in the vendor SOC annex was reviewed for clarity; proposed edits relate to uptime definitions and do not change pricing or revenue recognition.
We notified JPCERT/CC of the drill schedule per best practice, and no external regulator filings are required because there was no incident affecting customers or systems in production.
Staff were reminded of blackout policy and anti-tipping rules under the FIEA in connection with quarterly earnings, but this notice repeated already-published compliance guidance.
Preliminary internal note (not yet for TDnet): forensic triage indicates a single unauthorized API call against a non-production code repository at a consolidated subsidiary, to be briefed to the board before any public disclosure; until then, treat related technical details as material nonpublic information and add the affected project team to the insider list.
Current assessment shows no exfiltration and no employee records accessed; we will update if evidence changes and will avoid market commentary until facts are confirmed.
The acquisition working group for a small domestic systems integrator met separately under established information-barrier controls; this report does not discuss targets, terms, or timetables.
